'''yagaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadmin|coadmin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadmin|coadmin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yagaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yægæzæth|yægæzæth]] || [[word:yægæzæj|yægæzæj]] || [[word:yægæzæsh|yægæzæsh]] || [[word:yægæzæ|yægæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yagagazath|yagagazath]] || [[word:yagagazaj|yagagazaj]] || [[word:yagagazash|yagagazash]] || [[word:yagagaza|yagagaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yagazath|yagazath]] || [[word:yagazaj|yagazaj]] || [[word:yagazash|yagazash]] || [[word:yagaza|yagaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yagafzath|yagafzath]] || [[word:yagafzaj|yagafzaj]] || [[word:yagafzash|yagafzash]] || [[word:yagafzaf|yagafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yagazatha|yagazatha]] || [[word:yagazaja|yagazaja]] || [[word:yagazasha|yagazasha]] || [[word:yagazaka|yagazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yagazath|yagazath]] || [[word:yagazaj|yagazaj]] || [[word:yagazash|yagazash]] || [[word:yagaza|yagaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yagazathal|yagazathal]] || [[word:yagazajal|yagazajal]] || [[word:yagazashal|yagazashal]] || [[word:yagazakal|yagazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yagazathatha|yagazathatha]] || [[word:yagazajaja|yagazajaja]] || [[word:yagazashasha|yagazashasha]] || [[word:yagazaka|yagazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yagazathan|yagazathan]] || [[word:yagazajan|yagazajan]] || [[word:yagazashan|yagazashan]] || [[word:yagazakan|yagazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yagazathaoro|yagazathaoro]] || [[word:yagazajaoro|yagazajaoro]] || [[word:yagazashaoro|yagazashaoro]] || [[word:yagazakaoro|yagazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
